title: Roadmap: expose the wiki over MCP (hunch_wiki_status / hunch_now)
context: The wiki and the now-view are CLI-only; assistants can't ask 'which pages are stale' or 'what's on the roadmap' through the hunch_* tools. The MCP server must stay client-agnostic (con_e04226bd05); the runbook says mirror CLI ↔ MCP.
decision: Add read-only MCP tools mirroring wikiStatus + nowData (public-store only for anything that could be pasted — same jurisdiction rules as the pages).
